questions.question: How I am feeling right now?
What did I do today that actually matters?
questions.placeholder: Think about your meaningful actions, big or small...

questions.question: What weight am I carrying on my shoulders that I don't need to?
questions.placeholder: What worries, guilt, or burdens can you let go of?

questions.question: If tomorrow never came, would I be proud of how I lived today?
questions.placeholder: Reflect on your actions, words, and choices...

questions.question: What was the best part of my day?
questions.placeholder: Share a highlight, no matter how small...

questions.question: What challenged me today and what did I learn from it?
questions.placeholder: What was difficult and what wisdom did you gain?

questions.question: What I am grateful for right now?
questions.placeholder: Name at least three things, big or small...

questions.question: What intention would I like to set for tomorrow?
